revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Year in country portal box/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in country portal box/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Year in country portal box/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in country portal box/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Year in country portal box/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in country portal box/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|80126}}
== Usage == {{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|England}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring England and History.
This is used for example at [[:Category:16th century in England]]. {{clear}} The template takes up to three parameters, to handle cases where a portal for a specific topic may not exist. Up to three topics can be entered, starting with the most general and ending with the most specific.
There is also an optional parameter Year. If this is present, the template will include a link to the portal for the relevant decade, if it exists.
{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}} <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{yearInCountryPortalBox|United Kingdom|England|London|year=1995}}</syntaxhighlight> will create a portal box featuring London, History and 1990s portals.
If there was no London portal, it would show the England portal instead.
If there was neither a London nor an England portal, it would show the United Kingdom portal instead.
== Maintenance == [[Template:Year in country portal box/parse]] contains a list of switches where new country names, regions or continents may be specified for country names that do not have a portal of their own. In some cases this list gives two portals separated by %%, e.g. to add former colonial powers such as <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">| Spanish Sahara = Western Sahara %% Spain</syntaxhighlight> Two is the maximum; this aspect of the template will not work with three or more.
Date ranges may also be added e.g. for former colonial powers.
==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Year in country portal box with no existing country portal}}
== See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]]
<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Country templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
